race.comment: KRANICH (4) is yet to strike through this prep but is knocking on the door, rattling home into the placings in his last two. Peak fitness now and is drawn to take much closer order. The one to beat. THE SHAPER (7) couldn't keep up with a handy one in town last start but had been savaging the line at country level in his three runs prior. If he can settle a pair or two closer from he will prove hard to hold out. TOOMPINE (9) is rock-hard fit and doesn't need to improve much to be in the finish. DUMEBI (8) has only been fair in recent outings, but is capable when right and appears the next in line.
